<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/session-monitoring/rolling-monitored/bulk"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Enroll new shows into rolling monitoring and/or change the monitoring type of already-enrolled shows in bulk

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>

  parameters={undefined}

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"shows":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"sonarrSeriesId":{"type":"integer","exclusiveMinimum":true,"maximum":9007199254740991},"sonarrInstanceId":{"type":"integer","exclusiveMinimum":true,"maximum":9007199254740991},"title":{"type":"string"},"guids":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"rollingShowId":{"nullable":true,"type":"number"}},"required":["sonarrSeriesId","sonarrInstanceId","title","guids","rollingShowId"]}},"monitoringType":{"type":"string","enum":["pilotRolling","firstSeasonRolling","allSeasonPilotRolling"]},"resetMonitoring":{"type":"boolean"}},"required":["shows","monitoringType"]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
